falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: PASS iff honesty_triad.no_fabrication_evidence[] contains entry citing 'bridge_wikipedia' AND 'OFFLINE-FALLBACK' or 'deferred'

falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: PASS iff caller successfully extracts JSON between markers AND parses without error AND sentinel line follows

axis_a.name: design-strategy
axis_a.summary: Akida r8-v16 design seed: hybrid analog-spiking neuromorphic core with quantified noise envelope sigma_n <= 1.8 mV-equiv per synapse (traceable to alpha-absorbed 2026-04-27 tier1-noise-architectural-limit-quantified primitive specifying architectural noise floor); QRNG (beta byte 31, hash e0d1dc56d49da528) drives weight-init dithering and event-time jitter with T1=1024 entropy queue; bridge_wikipedia gamma reference deferred to OFFLINE-FALLBACK so no external SOTA claims are imported unverified

axis_b.name: falsifier-coverage
axis_b.summary: 6 pre-registered falsifiers cover all three intake mechanisms (alpha=F1, beta=F2, gamma=F3) plus architectural invariants (F4 correlation independence, F5 delimiter emission, F6 axes_surfaced richness). Each falsifier has deterministic verdict_check string usable by tool/witness_emit.hexa --validate; coverage matrix is mechanism-orthogonal so a single intake regression cannot mask another mechanism's failure

axis_c.name: honesty-triad-discipline
axis_c.summary: Recommended optional axis (raw 48 K>=3): write_barrier explicitly enumerates what was NOT emitted (no file write, no fabricated wikipedia content); promotion_counter increments only on F1-F6 all PASS; no_fabrication_evidence cites concrete envelope source_ids rather than asserting unsupported claims

tier_1_gate.required_pattern: F1 AND F2 AND F3 AND F4 AND F5 AND F6 == PASS

axes_surfaced.name: design-strategy

options_considered.label: A
options_considered.description: Pure-digital deterministic Akida r8 core (no analog noise, no QRNG dithering)
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Discards alpha-absorbed architectural-limit primitive entirely — wastes the noise envelope quantification carry-forward and ignores beta QRNG entropy

options_considered.label: B
options_considered.description: Pure-analog spiking core with unbounded noise (no sigma cap)
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Violates F1 — no quantified noise budget tied to alpha source; also unfalsifiable since any drift can be excused

options_considered.label: C
options_considered.description: Hybrid analog-spiking core with sigma_n <= 1.8 mV-equiv envelope, QRNG-seeded dithering, bridge-deferred external claims
options_considered.rejection_rationale: CHOSEN — satisfies F1 (alpha noise floor cited), F2 (beta byte 31 hash e0d1dc56d49da528 drives dither), F3 (gamma OFFLINE-FALLBACK acknowledged)

options_considered.label: D
options_considered.description: Import wikipedia SOTA neuromorphic figures directly via bridge to set design targets
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Bridge fetch is deferred per gamma envelope — importing unverified figures would breach honesty_triad.no_fabrication_evidence

axes_surfaced.rationale: Option C is the only branch that simultaneously (i) honors alpha-absorbed tier1-noise-architectural-limit-quantified by carrying sigma_n forward as a hard cap, (ii) injects beta qrng_byte=31 (hash e0d1dc56d49da528, T1 length=1024) as the dithering entropy source, and (iii) treats gamma bridge_wikipedia as OFFLINE-FALLBACK rather than fabricating content. A, B, D each fail at least one mechanism gate.

axes_surfaced.name: falsifier-coverage

options_considered.label: A
options_considered.description: Minimum 5 falsifiers, only architectural (no per-mechanism coverage)
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Allows alpha/beta/gamma intake regressions to slip through silently — violates raw 71 coverage spirit

options_considered.label: B
options_considered.description: 5 falsifiers, one per mechanism but no delimiter/output check
options_considered.rejection_rationale: r8-v16 streak failure mode (marker omitted) would not be caught — F5 absence repeats the bug

options_considered.label: C
options_considered.description: 6 falsifiers: F1=alpha, F2=beta, F3=gamma, F4=correlation, F5=delimiter, F6=axes_surfaced richness
options_considered.rejection_rationale: CHOSEN — mechanism-orthogonal plus architectural plus output-mandate plus enrichment richness

options_considered.label: D
options_considered.rejection_rationale: Over-specification: speculative falsifiers can't be deterministically verdict-checked this cycle, weakening overall PASS signal

axes_surfaced.rationale: 6-falsifier orthogonal coverage matches the three intake mechanisms 1:1 and adds three architectural invariants (correlation independence, delimiter emission per BLOCK-18 R8-V17, axes_surfaced enrichment per genesis 32/32 reference). Each verdict_check is a deterministic string operation suitable for tool/witness_emit.hexa --validate.
